creator: gregoryd.freebsd@free.fr
text:
There is a typo in the fdp-primer, in the chapter sgml-primer. "whereas" is spelled "where as", which is not academic...

Fix: I join a patch to apply to:
/usr/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/fdp-primer/sgml-primer/chapter.sgml

Patch attached with submission follows:
